column8: Representing Yemeni Diaspora at CCNY. We have spoken with the clubs involved in CW at our campus, and they mentioned that our cultural club, which also has a religious component aimed at empowering students with a Yemeni background, might not be allowed to participate in the event due to its cultural focus. We would be honored to be part of this event, as we believe it would greatly benefit the ummah. Could you please confirm if this restriction applies and if there are any specific policies we should be aware of?
